Program Three · AEA Certified

WaterAerobics

Low impact. High energy. All the fun. 💧

Water-based fitness that takes pressure off your joints while building real strength, cardio endurance, and flexibility. Perfect for all fitness levels — including those recovering from injury or managing chronic conditions.

Why Water? About the Class

✦ Water Aerobics at a Glance

🌊
Joint-Friendly MovementWater reduces impact by up to 90% vs. land exercise
💪
Full-Body WorkoutWater resistance works muscles from every angle
❤️
Cardio EnduranceEffective aerobic exercise that's gentle on the body
🧘
Flexibility & BalanceImprove range of motion in a safe, supportive environment
🌟
All Levels WelcomeBeginners to active adults, injury recovery to maintenance

"The water holds you up so you can push yourself further!"

🌊 AEA Certified · Silver Sneakers Eligible · All Bodies Welcome 💧

The Science of Aquatic Fitness

Why Water Aerobics?

🦴

Protects Your Joints

Buoyancy reduces stress on joints, making movement possible for people with arthritis, osteoporosis, or injury recovery.

💪

Natural Resistance

Water provides 12x more resistance than air, making every movement a full-body strength exercise without heavy weights.

🌡️

Cooling & Energizing

Exercising in water keeps your body cool and comfortable, allowing longer, more effective workouts.

⚖️

Balance & Stability

Water's resistance challenges your stabilizing muscles in all directions, dramatically improving balance over time.

🏃

Effective Cardio

Elevates your heart rate, improves circulation, and burns calories — all with a fraction of the impact of land workouts.

😊

Fun & Social

Classes are uplifting, energizing, and full of great music. The pool naturally fosters community and joy.

About the Class

AEA Certified Aquatic Fitness

Tami's water aerobics classes deliver a safe, effective, and genuinely fun full-body workout in the pool. Led by an AEA (Aquatic Exercise Association) Certified Instructor, every session is thoughtfully structured for maximum benefit with minimal risk.

Whether you're brand new to exercise, returning after injury, managing a chronic condition, or simply looking for a refreshing alternative to land-based fitness — water aerobics meets you exactly where you are.

Classes combine cardio, strength, flexibility, and balance work in a supportive, energizing atmosphere set to upbeat music you'll love.

  • Low-impact warm-up and mobility work
  • Cardio intervals in the water
  • Strength training using water resistance
  • Balance and stability exercises
  • Flexibility and cool-down stretching

Perfect for Everyone

No swimming ability required — classes take place in the shallow end where you can stand comfortably throughout.

Tami creates a welcoming, encouraging environment where every participant feels capable, celebrated, and motivated to keep coming back.

"The pool is our playground — and everyone's invited!" 🌊

✦ AEA Certified Instructor ✦ Silver Sneakers Compatible

Is This Class For You?

Water Aerobics Is Perfect For...

🦴

Joint Conditions

Arthritis, osteoporosis, or any condition that makes land exercise painful or difficult

🩹

Injury Recovery

Returning to fitness after surgery, injury, or a period of inactivity

👴

Active Seniors

Older adults looking to maintain strength, balance, and independence

🌱

Beginners

Anyone new to exercise who wants a gentle, welcoming place to start

💊

Chronic Conditions

Managing fibromyalgia, MS, diabetes, heart conditions, or other health challenges

🏊

Anyone & Everyone!

Anyone who loves to move, craves community, and wants to feel amazing in the water

T
Tami Kraeger

Your Instructor

Meet Tami Kraeger

As an AEA Certified Aquatic Fitness Instructor and 500+ Hour Registered Yoga Teacher, Tami brings deep expertise in movement, safety, and community-building to every class in the pool.

Her background spanning wellness, hospitality, group fitness, and safety leadership as a former flight attendant means every class is expertly managed, genuinely welcoming, and focused on your wellbeing from start to finish.

AEA Certified Aqua Fit 500+ Hr RYT Silver Sneakers Cosmic Kids Yoga Former Flight Attendant

Ready to Dive In?

Join a Water Aerobics Class

Contact Tami to find out about class schedules, locations, and how to get started. No experience needed — just bring yourself, a swimsuit, and an open mind!

Get Class Info

The water is warm. The welcome is warmer. 💧
